hook: Brand new vs resale landed: the data shows who blinks first

slides.sub: Brand new vs resale: prices, discounts, and which sellers are still moving units right now.

slides.lead: Resale landed transactions are closing — but the price gap is widening.

slides.pre: Sentosa Cove Coral Island — Feb 2025 transaction
slides.post: psf on 737 sqm detached — lowest Coral Island print since mid-2021, down from S$23,798 psf in Feb 2023

slides.title: Three signals in the resale data

items.body: Coral Island: 3 deals in 2025 YTD — all below S$15M, all below 2022–23 peak prints of S$20M–S$22.8M.
Faber Hills semi-Ds: Jan 2025 closed at S$7.1M vs S$7.8M in Nov 2024 — sellers trimming 9% in 2 months.
Springwood terraces (D5 RCR freehold): Mar 2026 closed at S$5.58M — a 14-month high, bucking the softening trend.

slides.title: Resale landed — recent closes by PSF

slides.label: Brand new vs resale
slides.punch: Coral Island is off 15% from peak. Faber Hills semi-Ds shed 9% in two months. But Springwood terraces in D5 just printed a 14-month high — location and freehold tenure still command a premium.
slides.punch_bold: The best resale buys are from sellers who bought at the 2022 peak and need to move now.

slides.pre: Springwood D5 RCR freehold terrace — Mar 2026 vs Jun 2022 median
slides.post: Freehold RCR terraces holding value — up ~11% from Jun 2022 comps at S$4.05M–S$5.03M; bucking broader resale softness

slides.pre: Eyeing landed in D4, D5, or D10?
slides.title: Let's map your
slides.sub: 30-min strategy call. No pitch — just the data, the comps, and the discount angles that matter right now.

slides.title: Forward this to
slides.sub: If you know anyone weighing resale landed this month, send them this before they make an offer.

caption:
📉 Resale landed is softening — but not evenly. Here's where the data sits right now.

• Coral Island (D4): Feb 2025 closed at S$14.8M — down 15% from the S$17.4M Feb 2023 comp
• Faber Hills semi-Ds: S$7.1M in Jan 2025 vs S$7.8M in Nov 2024 — sellers trimming 9% in 2 months
• Springwood terraces (D5 RCR freehold): Mar 2026 printed S$5.58M — a 14-month high, holding firm

Freehold tenure and RCR location are doing the heavy lifting. Leasehold CCR sellers are making the real concessions.
